"not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"resource-id": "de.smartchord.droid:id/scroll", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "1221a0b", "children": [{"text": "You already purchased the following products:
-



For more information see www.smartChord.de. The payment processing is always made via 'Google Play Store'.

Actually the features are activated immediately. The purchased products are listed at the end of the Shop dialog. Experience shows that the settlement via Google can sometimes take a little longer, however. Sometimes closing and restarting 'smartChord' can help.

The purchased products are also listed in the Google Play Store under 'My Account -> smartChord -> Subscriptions/Order History'.


It is our main concern to satisfy the desires and requirements of our users. Therefore we constantly develop smartChord further and appreciate your support in form of suggestions and hints. A big thank you to all our smartChord PLUS subscribers and buyers showing us that we are on the right track.
